title: Purpur Bars
description: Small plugin that implements Purpur's /tpsbar and /rambar for non Purpur-based servers
body:
# Purpur Bars Just a convenient plugin implementation of Purpur's [`/tpsbar`](https://github.com/PurpurMC/Purpur/commit/42bf7db01862c6bc9ed3441cd252655243b3a505) and [`/rambar`](https://github.com/PurpurMC/Purpur/commit/e13b74d31e76acb8fdd3023a176382f846e0b248) for non Purpur-based servers. \ If you **already run Purpur** in your server, you **don't need** this plugin. This plugin is for server owners that need to monitor their server performance during gameplay and run Paper or Pufferfish forks that don't implement this feature. ## Screenshot
## Commands * `/purpurbars reload`: Reload plugin configuration * `/tpsbar`: Shows Purpur's TPS bar * `/rambar`: Shows Purpur's RAM bar * `/compass`: Shows Purpur's Compass bar * `/ram`: Shows RAM usage in chat ## Permissions * `purpurbars.admin`: Reload the plugin * `purpurbars.monitor.tps`: Use `/tpsbar` command * `purpurbars.monitor.ram`: Use `/rambar` command * `purpurbars.monitor.compass`: Use `/compass` command * `purpurbars.check.ram`: Use `/ram` command ## Credits All credits to [PurpurMC Team](https://github.com/PurpurMC/Purpur/)
